channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Man City have lost control of the Premier League title race: Guardiola
item.description: Man City's 3–3 draw at Everton has left them five points adrift of leaders Arsenal, albeit with a game in hand.

item.title: A small plane crashes into building in Brazil, killing three
item.description: A small plane carrying five people crashed into a residential building in Belo Horizonte, Brazil, shortly after takeoff.

item.title: States should tax windfall oil profits to fund their way out of crisis
item.description: A major economic crisis is boosting energy profits. Taxing those can help countries survive and become immune to shocks.

item.title: An explosion at a fireworks plant in China has killed at least 21 people
item.description: An explosion at a fireworks plant in a central Chinese province has killed at least 21 people and injured 61 others.

item.title: ‘Dangerous escalation’: World condemns Iran after attacks on UAE
item.description: Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait and Bahrain denounce strikes, as Germany, UK and Canada urge Iran to return to talks.

item.title: Oil prices surge as violence flares in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude rises nearly 6 percent as soaring tensions in waterway push ceasefire to the brink.

item.title: Strong security presence in Mexico’s Sinaloa state amid cartel violence
item.description: Security forces have intensified their presence across parts of Mexico’s Sinaloa.

item.title: Israeli strike sparks fire in northern Gaza City
item.description: Video from Gaza City shows flames rising after an Israeli strike targeted a group of civilians.

item.title: Alabama lawmakers adjourn after protests over redistricting
item.description: Alabama lawmakers adjourned their session after protesters entered the State House during protests over redistricting.

item.title: Newborn born in Nablus a day after his father was killed in Israeli raid
item.description: A Palestinian family in Nablus has welcomed a newborn whose father was shot dead by Israeli forces.

item.title: Iran war live: Washington, Tehran trade threats over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Israeli attacks have killed 2,696 people in Lebanon since March 2, the country's Health Ministry reports.

item.title: ‘Extensive brutality’: Rebel attacks reap hell on Congolese civilians
item.description: ISIL-linked group has tortured, killed and abducted civilians in the Democratic Republic of Congo, including children.

item.title: For Christians in Israel and Jerusalem, intolerance is becoming normal
item.description: Despite official framing, for Christians there is little new in last week's assault on a French nun in East Jerusalem.

item.title: Brazil’s Lula to travel to US to meet with Trump later this week
item.description: Media reports say the Brazilian president will meet with his US counterpart in the White House in the coming days.

item.title: Hormuz tensions push ceasefire to the brink as Trump threatens Iran
item.description: US military says it is encouraging ships to pass through Hormuz Strait, but Iran says it is in full control of waterway.

item.title: Is Israel’s interception of the Global Sumud Flotilla legal?
item.description: Spain says Israel's detention of two activists is abduction.

item.title: Video: Modi’s BJP poised to take control in India’s West Bengal
item.description: India Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s ruling BJP is set to GAIN (wrest) control of West Bengal.

item.title: Russia and Ukraine declare competing ceasefires
item.description: Moscow's declaration of May 9 truce comes as Kyiv revels in its adversary's 'fear' of Ukrainian drones.

item.title: Police clash with protesters after ICE arrest in New York
item.description: Police clashed with protesters outside a New York hospital where a man arrested by ICE agents was being treated.

item.title: Moscow rehearses V-Day parade marking WWII victory
item.description: Russia rehearsed its Victory Day parade and declared a ceasefire with Ukraine to cover the May 9 celebrations.

item.title: Mali leader Goita takes defence post after minister killed
item.description: Military leader promotes himself after defence minister killed in attacks linked to al-Qaeda and Tuareg separatists.

item.title: Gangland wars killing dozens of bystanders, report Swedish police
item.description: Deaths due to gang violence included people hit by stray bullets, cases of mistaken identity, and relatives of gang members.

item.title: Iran-US clash over alleged warship attack in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran claims its navy forced a US warship to turn back from the Strait of Hormuz as Washington denies any clash.

item.title: Zambia delaying US deals over minerals and data demands
item.description: Government calls for partnership not aid as it rejects US funds due to strategic autonomy concerns.

item.title: Tackling methane emissions key for climate change and energy security: IEA
item.description: Dealing with emissions could help alleviate effects of Iran crisis on global energy supply, says report.
